news.t: Camurus announces FDA acceptance of NDA resubmission for Oclaiz™ for the treatment of acromegaly
Camurus announces positive Phase 3 results from the ACROINNOVA 2 study of octreotide SC depot (CAM2029) in acromegaly patients
Cambiar Investors Launches Aggressive Value ETF

holdings.infoBox: CAMX is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are Honeywell International stock at 4.76%, Uber Technologies at 4.72%, Elevance Health at 4.52%, Southwest Airlines Co. at 4.23%, and Airbus SE at 4.18%.

overview.description: The Cambiar Aggressive Value ETF (CAMX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed, global equity fund. Stock selection and weighting is based on the Issuers strongest belief for long-term capital appreciation. CAMX was launched on Feb 13, 2023 and is issued by Cambiar Funds.

data.text: PDUFA target action date set to 10 June 2026 LUND, Sweden, Jan. 9, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Camurus (NASDAQ STO: CAMX) today announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has accepted for rev...

data.title: Camurus announces positive Phase 3 results from the ACROINNOVA 2 study of octreotide SC depot (CAM2029) in acromegaly patients
data.text: Treatment well tolerated with a safety profile consistent with standard-of-care (SoC) Increased biochemical response rates (IGF-1 ≤ 1xULN) vs SoC at baseline Continuous improvement of acromegaly sympt...

data.title: Cambiar Investors Launches Aggressive Value ETF
data.text: DENVER--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Cambiar Investors announces the launch of a new active ETF.
